name: Chioma Obi
quote: The EducationUSA scholars programme transformed my future. The step-by-step admissions support was unlike anything else available in Nigeria.

name: Emeka Nwosu
quote: I had no idea how to navigate U.S. applications. This programme gave me the tools, the mentorship, and the confidence to apply and succeed.

name: Fatima Aliyu
quote: As a girl from northern Nigeria, I never imagined studying AI in America. This programme made that dream real.

name: Tunde Adeyemi
quote: The visa preparation resources were invaluable. I walked into my embassy interview with complete confidence and came out with my visa.

name: Ngozi Eze
quote: The scholarship search module alone saved me from giving up. I found three funding sources I would never have discovered on my own.
